name: V I P Limousine
recent_news: No notable news found; very small 3-employee operation in Lake Worth, FL. Multiple unrelated 'VIP limo' brands in South FL make verification difficult.
fit_notes: Appears to be a tiny limo/livery operator, not a school bus contractor despite 'special_needs' flag. Not a credible Summit tuck-in target — wrong service line and sub-scale.

name: Randy's Mobility
recent_news: Confirmed NOT a school bus/student transport operator — rents scooters, ECVs, wheelchairs, strollers, mobility equipment to vacationers in the Orlando theme-park area.
fit_notes: Out of scope — mobility equipment rental company, not a transportation operator. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Canyon Country Elite Trnsprtn
districts_or_customers: Wellsboro/Tioga County PA tourism; weddings, proms, wine tours
recent_news: Operates as 'Canyon Country Cabs and Elite Transportation' in Wellsboro, PA at 11960 Route 6. Provides limo/bus services for weddings, proms, wine tours, PA Grand Canyon tours (Mon/Wed/Fri seasonally), groups of 4-14, has a wheelchair bus and Hummer limo. Not a school bus contractor.
fit_notes: Tourism/limo/charter operator with wheelchair-van capability, not a school district contractor. Sub-scale and wrong service line for Summit tuck-in.

name: A Accessible Transport
recent_news: No specific online presence found; name suggests small wheelchair/NEMT operator in Ormond Beach/Volusia County area. Region served by VoRide (VoAccess) public paratransit.
fit_notes: Micro NEMT/paratransit operator — not a school bus contractor. 3 employees, PO box address suggest owner-operator scale. Not a credible Summit tuck-in target.

name: Alliance Transport Svc
recent_news: No school-bus connection found. Multiple unrelated 'Alliance Transportation' entities nationwide (auto-hauler in S. FL, FMCSA carrier DOT 1705622). Daytona Beach 3-employee entry at residential-style address suggests micro NEMT/paratransit, not school transport.
fit_notes: Sub-scale (3 employees) likely NEMT operator, not a school district contractor. Not a credible Summit tuck-in target.
